name: ViewSonic VG3456A 34” Ultrawide QHD Docking Monitor - 3440x1440 - 100Hz Refresh Rate - 5ms GTG - Dual 100W and 15W USB-C Ports - Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 Port - Built-in 5W Front-Facing Speakers - 2x HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort - 4x USB Type-A 3.2
shortName: ViewSonic VG3456A 34” Ultrawide QHD Docking Monitor - 3440x1440
description: A 34-inch ultrawide QHD docking monitor with dual USB-C ports and built-in speakers, designed for professionals and content creators needing extended screen real estate.
